MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Jason Bandera
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael Kiley, is present.
Attorney, John Weinstein , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-10-2010 is vacated.
